message:
fix: complete fcp-store concentration enforcement tests with missing StoreLogData returns

Two new tests (planner_detects_concentration_only_violation and
can_reconstruct_with_policy_concentration) were missing their
StoreLogData return values, causing compilation failures. Also includes
the supporting coverage.rs and no_mock_integration.rs changes for
concentration deficit tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
